reviews.review_description:
As a physical therapist, I fully endorse this app. 

Simply put, the key to overcoming frozen shoulder is consistent movement. This app, especially was used with the guidance of a PT, is a fun and engaging way to increase movement and to do so daily. 

VR applications like this are the future and the public can gain a lot of benefit from their use. Not only will it improve health, it will decrease the financial burden of co-pays and work time missed. It will also increase patient access. 

I envision this being used remotely so people who have to travel a long way will be able to use the app daily, do some remote check ins every couple of weeks, and only do in person visits maybe once a month. 

This is exciting stuff!

Was looking forward to trying this but alas it hangs at calibration stage. 

Does initial measurement then sits at uploading data - I left it for 30 mins but still there. 

Ah well, looking for another app to do the job

developer_response.body: Apologies ParkPie for the inconvenience.   The application is in the early test stages of release.  If you get the opportunity please download and try again.  Please email me at gadams@triadlabs.com if we can help. - Greg

reviews.review_description: I was excited to try this app but I can't get past the calibration stage. I'm following the instructions but the percentage never changes. Any suggestions welcomed

developer_response.body: Hello Sheepslam - the application has been updated since you tried.  It prefers that you be in a standing position and also requires an internet connection.  If you still have interest please download the latest and retry.   Please email me at gadams@triadlabs.com if i can assist. - Greg

reviews.review_description: I've been having problems and immense pain in my shoulders and this has helped very much,I do recommend to people to try this app !
I’m in my 60’s and really enjoy playing this!
